review_title: little difficult for first time beginners
description: I like having easy access, but it's a bit of learning curve to learn how to navigate. It took me quite a while to even find time records.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that I can see all my paystubs together.
cons: limited customization and not very user friendly interface. I had to navigate through to find what I want. It wasn't very easy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am very happy with the way [sensitive content hidden] took care of us and he is always available to quickly resolve our questions and issues. And I think [sensitive content hidden] (Sales/Simulation demo) did a really great job on the beginning as our first impression of the services.
author: Marcio R.
pros: The refinement of granular information we can find across many options and menus on the platform and the training /customer support.
cons: Not having PAYCOR as one of the fully integrations pre made like ADT. We had to create a custom map for exporting data across.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: great dash board, time off request, I like the GPS.
author: Robin T.
pros: tracks employee times , hours worked and dollars
cons: nothing works great works great for me no negitive

review_title: Most afforadable scheduling, timeclock, and virtural staff management app out there!
description: I was looking for a software or app that cold provide timeclock services or just eliminate my curent system of paperwork. I have had papers get lost or dirty and suffered from theft. So finding Tanda.co was above and beyond what I needed. There were so many ways that I could improve my clockin experience and data management. I especally like the onboarding and dashboard for tracking schedules at a glance. Overall I really like how it fits my company and the ease of use. Great for virtural work too!
author: Aisha D.
pros: I really like all of the features. It is a website that has convenient app for my workers and crews to clock in no matter what site they are on. I like that its good for my feild workers and office since we went virtural. The onboarding feature and dashboard lets me see everything at a glance. And because of the ease of use I can assign staff administrative roles. I also like that I can assign different roles and access levels to specific works. Workforce.com is the best app I have used for managing my staff.
cons: I would like to incorperate a space for site progress. Because my crews are working different sites at once it would be helpfull if I could collect data from the site like pictures. Also, maybe a chat feature. If I could text within the app to the feild or get quick reminders out that would be helpfull. Or some sort of reminder chat bot. I have had cases where workers forgot to clock in and out so it would be helpfull for an AI chat bot to pop up and say "you have 20 minuets before your shift is over. do you want to clock out automaticly or request more time on the site".

description: I have not experienced anything that had a negative effect on staffing
author: larry G.
pros: The features are so easy to use and adjust when neded
cons: I do not have any cons on this product. Adding new staff and tracking days off are very simple

description: Generally, it has been good. When I need special reports, WF is responsive and helps me get exactly what I need without delay. Staff like it because it simplifies their scheduling experience.
author: G.T. C.
pros: The relative ease of tracking staff time and building out schedules to accommodate their needs.
cons: It is sometimes difficult to figure out which component that I need to access to review staff compliance with their own schedule to ensure they are not working hours outside of what they are scheduled.

author: Brett B.
pros: Workforce has been great for scheduling purposes.
cons: There have been no issues using Workforce.

description: It was very helpful in getting my time at work noted.
author: Courtney B.
pros: I have used this app in older workplaces and it was very helpful as far as getting clocked in and out.
cons: The slowness of the app at times and how frequently updates were required.

author: Cody E.
pros: Smooth and seamless for multi store scheduling and proper HR functions.
cons: That I didn't implement this sooner throughout my organization
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This is my first time accessing workforce.com
author: Lynnet D.
pros: It is easy to access and also easy to manage.
cons: There is nothing I would change at this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Some of the benefits of workforce would be; * Organization* Time tracking
author: Debora A.
pros: The product is easy to use and the integration was pretty much easier than any other similar products. The scheduling future is okay, you get to view all employees calendar the way you want it to appear. The clock in and out feature has had some few challenges here and there since most employees complain of not being able to clock in and out but overally okay for those who get to use it.
cons: The clock in and out feature. We've had multiple complains from our employees about it. Some are not able to use the future due to multiple reasons related to the product.

review_title: Reliability and dependability in full control. Workforce.com is the best.
description: Awesome experience. It's a game changer software which is doubtlessly amazing.
author: Mihail T.
pros: This software is the best in saving time and labour for shift workforces. I have enjoyed an easy to use and customizable dashboard. Employee engagement is at its best giving the freedom over workforce management needs. It is cost effective and very impactful. I highly recommend Workforce.com.
cons: I am happy with what I get from Workforce.com. It is satisfying.

description: easy perfect and efficient and much easier
author: abdellatif M.
pros: the ability to use in an easy way and efficient way
cons: so many options to use and to learn from

review_title: Workforce.com makes scheduling and tracking time a breeze!
author: Jesus Q.
pros: Easy to use, great for managing shifts and time tracking.
cons: Could use more advanced reporting and analytics features.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Workforce.com has made scheduling easier and convenient.
author: Sarah S.
pros: Very easy to customize, so that I could filter it accordingly.
cons: I would like to see an option of the schedules that I deleted, hopefully this option is available for Assistant Managers.

description: Amazing, helps me keep employees organized and helps me do payroll efficiently. if it wasn't for workforce payroll would take me days to do!
author: kas V.
pros: the functionality and the Userfriendly dashboards. I use workforce to organize my employees' timesheets and their schedules.
cons: don't really like the app on my phone from an admin standpoint, but i usually go on a desktop so i use it on there.

description: We were searching for an updated scheduling and time keeping solution and this system became so much more. We were able to eliminate excess work and are able to keep our information all in one place.
author: Marisa F.
pros: The experts that helped us quickly get our account set up for success and the easy transition we had for our staff.
cons: Nothing yet. I truly appreciate the suggestion feature and the weekly emails updating users about suggestions that have been implemented.

review_title: The only software that did everything
description: I had a great onboarding/setup experience. The software does exactly what my business needs and makes everyone convenient for employees
author: Benjamin L.
pros: Scheduling is very easy and it uploads hours easily to ADP. The vacation tracking tool is very easy to manage and have employees request time off.
cons: The break tracking is not very flexible. I need it cutoff paying for time taken passed the allotted break period.

description: Overall, our experience with Workforce.com has been excellent. It’s reliable, easy to navigate, and has all the core features we need to manage our team effectively. From onboarding to tracking time and billable hours, everything runs smoothly.
author: Alec M.
pros: Workforce.com is user-friendly for both our team members and admins. The onboarding tools and time tracking features have made it much easier to monitor billable hours across various client projects. Definitely recommend.
cons: We had one payroll error early on, but support resolved it quickly. Other than that, no major complaints so far.

description: Definite learning curve getting every department, role, etc set up, but end product worth the effort. So nice to have schedule and time card connected under one software product.
author: Deb R.
pros: It is able to house so much information that was previously in multiple locations. Saves time and allows communication to all members of the scheduling and payroll process.
cons: Prior software allowed staff to see changes made to initially published schedule as they happen. Workforce does require publishing after all changes. Not that I don't like it, but it is something I have to be mindful of.

description: User-friendly, efficient, and reliable tool that streamlines scheduling and improves team productivity
author: Samkele G.
pros: Easy scheduling, real-time updates, and clear shift management that improve team coordination, its very easy to use.
cons: I wish we could scroll down when looking at the worksheet as appose to having to select different weeks
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Its pretty good most of the time. Not a lot of down time.
author: blenda H.
pros: I like how it is in real time. That let you know exactly where your teammates are.
cons: Sometimes I cant get into the timesheets of my employees
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Not the best, but not the worst.
description: My overall experience has been okay but I think it lacks the functionality I am looking for.
author: Arial N.
pros: I do like that I can assign shift takes through the apps for certain employees.
cons: Live chat support is just a bot, there is no real person to talk to. No free trial.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, workforce.com is still an effective and efficient tool for publishing schedule and calibrating timesheet in one report. Just need minor improvement on troubleshooting.
author: Jason Andre M.
pros: It has the app and web version which gives you two different interface and types of access, gives you more option to explore it!
cons: on my organization, agents are having time to time issues where they aren't seeing the shifts that they claimed which also takes time before being troubleshoot.

description: I have found it to be efficient and very useful.
author: Angles S.
pros: Workforce allows me to schedule my students according to their schedules. Students are able to add their times that they're not able to work. This saves me countless hours.
cons: Having to schedule blocks in 30-minute intervals.
